what_was_built: reports/crypto_d1_dataset_manifest_v1/dataset_manifest.json (machine-readable Crypto-D1 dataset-manifest specification; 35 future manifest fields; 7-status QA model; allowed/forbidden file formats; freeze rules)

reports/crypto_d1_dataset_manifest_v1/dataset_manifest.md (human-readable: schema table for every required field; identity + provenance + freeze + QA status rules; allowed/forbidden file formats with placeholder naming examples; no-profit-claim policy)
tests/test_crypto_d1_dataset_manifest.py (30 tests covering schema + safety + validator failure modes + no-real-data-files + tool stdlib-only + integration with prior bundles)
tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py: crypto_d1_protocol seed extended via extra_files to include the new dataset_manifest docs (lane stays WATCH; never ACTIVE / never STRONG)

follows_contract_and_protocol.phase_satisfied: P2_dataset_manifest_freeze (spec layer only -- the future per-dataset manifest authoring is a separate, separately-authorized P2 bundle)

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: Dataset manifest approval does not imply edge
Clean daily OHLCV data does not imply profit
A manifest cannot authorize backtesting by itself
A manifest cannot authorize paper or live trading
Crypto trend ideas are not profitable until tested

guardrails_held: never STRONG evidence in the auto-build path

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Both arbitrage and crypto_d1 are now WATCH (same +15 bonus). Arbitrage still wins via the existing protocol-first / data-first scoring hints in its queue item. Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. Operator should consult both lanes' next-step lists to pick the actual Bundle 14.

how_this_follows_contract_and_protocol: Crypto-D1 Protocol Memo v1 (Bundle 11) declared P2_dataset_manifest_freeze as a required future artifact.

Crypto-D1 Data Contract v1 (Bundle 12) declared 'Crypto-D1 Dataset Manifest v1 (P2)' as the next required future artifact and pinned 'data_contract_version' / 'protocol_version' references that every future manifest must carry.
This bundle authors the dataset-manifest SPECIFICATION -- spec only; no data is fetched, no backtest is run, no dataset is processed, no real data files are created.
All seven safety flags from the protocol and data contract carry verbatim into the manifest spec.
Lane scope is identical: BTC / ETH / SOL, spot only, daily only, 24/7; perps and intraday remain separately-future protocols.
Future manifest required fields include 'data_contract_version' and 'protocol_version', so any per-dataset manifest must pin both Bundle 11 and Bundle 12 (or later) explicitly.
OHLCV required-columns + quality rules match the data contract one-for-one.
recommended_next_bundle: Crypto-D1 Data QA / Freeze Spec v1 (P2) -- QA harness spec for daily-crypto data. Spec only, no harness run.
Crypto-D1 Data Source Evaluation Memo v1 -- written assessment of which offline data sources could later satisfy this manifest. Memo only, no fetch.
Crypto-D1 Baseline Backtest Plan v1 (P3 / P4) -- pre-registration memo for the FIRST candidate strategy family + IS / OOS split. Plan only, no backtest run.
Crypto-D1 Data Acquisition Authorization Draft -- still spec-only; only if the operator wants to start the path toward an actual P2 acquisition.
